# claudeadmin_federation_rule_workspace (Resource)

Enables a federation rule for an additional workspace. Composite ID `<rule_id>:<workspace_id>`. **Requires OAuth Bearer auth.**

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claudeadmin_federation_rule_workspace" "ci_in_staging" {
  federation_rule_id = claudeadmin_federation_rule.github_repo_main.id
  workspace_id       = claudeadmin_workspace.staging.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `federation_rule_id` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
